expected_answer: Payments above 250,000 USD require dual approval from Finance Operations and Risk Management.
Severity one incidents are acknowledged within fifteen minutes and receive hourly updates.
It was rated medium because access was limited to staging metadata, had no write permissions, and logs showed no evidence of data extraction.
The provisional approval permits internal operational metadata but excludes regulated health data until open findings are closed.
AI-generated recommendations cannot be the sole basis for legal, medical, employment, credit, or security access decisions; human review and source verification are required.
